languages.text: "Исключено. На текущей стадии процесс нельзя прерывать, даже по просьбе Вольного Торговца". {n}Техножрец не выказывает ни малейшего удивления, словно ждал вашего визита.{/n} "Я буду готов к беседе с вами приблизительно через минуту".

"Impossible. At the present stage, the process cannot be interrupted, not even at the behest of the Rogue Trader." {n}The Tech-Priest shows no hint of surprise, as though he had been expecting your visit.{/n} "I will be ready to speak with you in approximately one minute."
languages.original_text: "Исключено. На текущей стадии процесс нельзя прерывать, даже по просьбе Вольного Торговца". {n}Техножрец не выказывает ни малейшего удивления, словно ждал вашего визита.{/n} "Я буду готов к беседе с вами приблизительно через минуту".

"Impossible. At the present stage, the process cannot be interrupted, not even at the behest of the Rogue Trader." {n}The Tech-Priest shows no hint of surprise, as though he had been expecting your visit.{/n} "I will be ready to speak with you in approximately one minute."

"Impossible. At the present stage, the process cannot be interrupted, not even at the behest of the Rogue Trader." {n}The Tech-Priest shows no hint of surprise, as though he had been expecting your visit.{/n} "I will be ready to speak with you in approximately one minute."

languages.text: “不可能。在当前阶段，进程无法中断——即便是行商浪人的命令也不行。”{n}这位技术神甫神情平静，仿佛早已预料到你的来访。{/n}“大约一分钟后，我便可以与您交谈。”
languages.original_text: "Impossible. At the present stage, the process cannot be interrupted, not even at the behest of the Rogue Trader." {n}The Tech-Priest shows no hint of surprise, as though he had been expecting your visit.{/n} "I will be ready to speak with you in approximately one minute."

traits.locale_text: “不可能。在当前阶段，进程无法中断——即便是行商浪人的命令也不行。”{n}这位技术神甫神情平静，仿佛早已预料到你的来访。{/n}“大约一分钟后，我便可以与您交谈。”

languages.text: « Impossible. À ce stade, le processus ne peut pas être interrompu, même sur ordre d'{mf|un libre-marchand|une libre-marchande}. » {n}Le technoprêtre ne semble pas surpris de vous voir, comme s'il s'attendait à votre venue.{/n} « Je serai en mesure de vous parler dans une minute environ. »
languages.original_text: "Impossible. At the present stage, the process cannot be interrupted, not even at the behest of the Rogue Trader." {n}The Tech-Priest shows no hint of surprise, as though he had been expecting your visit.{/n} "I will be ready to speak with you in approximately one minute."

traits.locale_text: « Impossible. À ce stade, le processus ne peut pas être interrompu, même sur ordre d'{mf|un libre-marchand|une libre-marchande}. » {n}Le technoprêtre ne semble pas surpris de vous voir, comme s'il s'attendait à votre venue.{/n} « Je serai en mesure de vous parler dans une minute environ. »

languages.text: «Imposible. El proceso no puede interrumpirse en este momento, ni siquiera por orden de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente». {n}El tecnosacerdote no parece sorprendido, como si hubiese esperado tu llegada.{/n} «Estaré en condiciones de hablar con usted en aproximadamente un minuto».
languages.original_text: "Impossible. At the present stage, the process cannot be interrupted, not even at the behest of the Rogue Trader." {n}The Tech-Priest shows no hint of surprise, as though he had been expecting your visit.{/n} "I will be ready to speak with you in approximately one minute."

traits.locale_text: «Imposible. El proceso no puede interrumpirse en este momento, ni siquiera por orden de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente». {n}El tecnosacerdote no parece sorprendido, como si hubiese esperado tu llegada.{/n} «Estaré en condiciones de hablar con usted en aproximadamente un minuto».

languages.text: "İmkânsız. Şu anki aşamada süreç, Hür Tacir'in emriyle bile kesintiye uğratılamaz." {n}Tekno Rahip, sanki ziyaretini bekliyormuş gibi hiçbir şaşkınlık belirtisi göstermiyor.{/n} "Yaklaşık bir dakika sonra sizinle konuşmaya hazır olacağım."
languages.original_text: "Impossible. At the present stage, the process cannot be interrupted, not even at the behest of the Rogue Trader." {n}The Tech-Priest shows no hint of surprise, as though he had been expecting your visit.{/n} "I will be ready to speak with you in approximately one minute."

traits.locale_text: "İmkânsız. Şu anki aşamada süreç, Hür Tacir'in emriyle bile kesintiye uğratılamaz." {n}Tekno Rahip, sanki ziyaretini bekliyormuş gibi hiçbir şaşkınlık belirtisi göstermiyor.{/n} "Yaklaşık bir dakika sonra sizinle konuşmaya hazır olacağım."

languages.text: "Unmöglich. In der jetzigen Phase darf der Prozess nicht unterbrochen werden, nicht einmal auf Geheiß {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}." {n}Der Techpriester ist kein bisschen überrascht, als hätte er mit deinem Besuch gerechnet.{/n} "Ich werde in etwa einer Minute bereit sein, mit Euch zu reden."
languages.original_text: "Impossible. At the present stage, the process cannot be interrupted, not even at the behest of the Rogue Trader." {n}The Tech-Priest shows no hint of surprise, as though he had been expecting your visit.{/n} "I will be ready to speak with you in approximately one minute."

traits.locale_text: "Unmöglich. In der jetzigen Phase darf der Prozess nicht unterbrochen werden, nicht einmal auf Geheiß {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}." {n}Der Techpriester ist kein bisschen überrascht, als hätte er mit deinem Besuch gerechnet.{/n} "Ich werde in etwa einer Minute bereit sein, mit Euch zu reden."

languages.text: 「不可能です。現段階では、この過程は中断できません。たとえローグトレーダーのご命令であろうとも」{n}技術司祭は、まるであなたの来訪を予期していたかのように、驚いた素振りも見せない。{/n}「およそ一分後には、あなたとお話しする準備が整います」
languages.original_text: "Impossible. At the present stage, the process cannot be interrupted, not even at the behest of the Rogue Trader." {n}The Tech-Priest shows no hint of surprise, as though he had been expecting your visit.{/n} "I will be ready to speak with you in approximately one minute."

traits.locale_text: 「不可能です。現段階では、この過程は中断できません。たとえローグトレーダーのご命令であろうとも」{n}技術司祭は、まるであなたの来訪を予期していたかのように、驚いた素振りも見せない。{/n}「およそ一分後には、あなたとお話しする準備が整います」
